footer.tagline: Trusted coordination for the China–Europe corridor.

home.heroHeadline: Trusted coordination for the China – Europe corridor
home.heroSubhead: Mirai Consulting helps organizations and professionals operate across the China ↔ Poland ↔ Europe corridor through multilingual coordination, partner orchestration, and cross-border execution.
home.chineseOrgsDesc: Entering Poland, Estonia, or the Nordics? We coordinate your market entry end-to-end.
home.professionalsDesc: Living in Europe? We help you navigate integration, career, and community.
home.europeanFirmsDesc: Looking toward China? We provide cultural intelligence, matchmaking, and delegation support.
home.howWeWorkBody: We own the client relationship and orchestrate vetted local specialists — lawyers, tax advisors, immigration experts, recruiters — so nothing gets lost in translation. Literally or culturally.

sectors.logisticsDesc: Poland at the heart of Eurasian transport corridors.
sectors.agriFoodDesc: Opening China's market to European producers.
sectors.tourismDesc: People-to-people exchange as a bilateral priority.
sectors.educationDesc: Bridging educational systems across the corridor.

sector_logistics_rail.name: Logistics, rail & freight
sector_logistics_rail.positioning: Poland sits at the heart of Eurasian transport corridors
sector_logistics_rail.whyBody: Poland functions as one of Europe's most important transit countries, with key intermodal nodes at Łódź, Sławków, Poznań/CLIP, and Gdańsk. The China-Europe Railway Express connects Chinese manufacturing to European distribution, and Poland is a critical gateway. The 2025 Intergovernmental Committee Joint Conclusions highlight railway, maritime, air transport, and logistics chain cooperation as key priorities.

sector_ev_batteries.name: EV, batteries & green industry
sector_ev_batteries.whyBody: Poland is building a full domestic electromobility value chain. The 2024–2027 Action Plan highlights green development and EV cooperation. Major Chinese investments include Ronbay Technology's cathode materials plant in Konin. The 2025 Joint Conclusions explicitly recognize Poland's battery manufacturing ambition.
sector_ev_batteries.service3: Translation and negotiation support for industrial deals
sector_ev_batteries.service5: Regulatory navigation for green energy investments

sector_agri_food.name: Agri-food & market access
sector_agri_food.positioning: Opening China's market to European producers
sector_agri_food.whyBody: The 2025 Joint Conclusions specifically address HPAI zoning implementation, lifting animal epidemic bans, and promoting Polish agricultural products' entry into China. Bilateral efforts aim to reduce trade imbalance by expanding two-way agri-food trade.
sector_agri_food.service2: China market partner search for European producers
sector_agri_food.service4: Delegation hosting for food industry clients

sector_tourism_delegations.name: Tourism, culture & delegations
sector_tourism_delegations.positioning: People-to-people exchange is a bilateral priority
sector_tourism_delegations.whyBody: People-to-people exchange is one of four headline pillars in the 2024–2027 Action Plan. Visa-free access for Polish citizens, 38 sister-city pairs, and growing tourism cooperation create a foundation for cultural and business exchange.
sector_tourism_delegations.service3: Protocol, itinerary design, and stakeholder mapping

sector_education_training.name: Education & training
sector_education_training.positioning: Bridging educational systems across the corridor
sector_education_training.whyBody: Poland has over 2,000 vocational schools with 800,000+ students. China–Poland VET cooperation includes teacher exchange, joint programs, and school-enterprise links. Chinese language education in Poland exists but remains structurally limited, indicating real demand for intercultural and language services.

sector_banking_institutional.name: Banking & institutional
sector_banking_institutional.whyBody: Bank of China and ICBC maintain branches in Warsaw. EXIM Bank presence supports project financing. This institutional banking infrastructure gives Chinese investors confidence that Warsaw is corridor-ready, but navigating it requires local knowledge.

about.headline: Built from both sides of the corridor
about.story:
Mirai Consulting was founded by Matt Więckowski and Zekai Xu — a Polish-Chinese partnership forged at Lund University in Sweden, with roots reaching to Fudan University in Shanghai and Zhejiang University in Hangzhou.

Matt brings strategy consulting experience from Shanghai, Geneva, and the Nordic tech ecosystem. Zekai brings deep research expertise on Chinese diaspora communities in Europe and years of cross-cultural program coordination. Together, they saw the same gap from both sides of the corridor: organizations crossing between China and Europe don't just need advice. They need someone who coordinates, translates — not just words, but systems and cultures — and makes things actually happen.

The name Mirai (未来) means 'future' — a deliberate choice for a firm that helps clients build what comes next, across borders.
about.mission: We believe cross-border business works best when both sides truly understand each other — not just the words, but the systems, cultures, and unspoken expectations.
about.principle4: Trusted coordination — we make things work, not just advise
about.mattBio: Matt is a strategy consultant with cross-border experience spanning China, Sweden, Switzerland, and Poland. He holds a double Master's from Lund University and Fudan University in Shanghai, combining development studies with Chinese sociology. His career includes strategic analysis for an AI-driven energy supply chain platform in Shanghai, private sector partnerships at UNHCR in Geneva, and business development for Nordic tech companies. He speaks English, Polish, Swedish, Mandarin Chinese, and French.
about.mattCredentials: Lund University · Fudan University · UNHCR Geneva
about.zekaiBio: Zekai is a researcher and cultural strategist with deep expertise in Chinese diaspora communities across Europe. He holds a Master's in Social Anthropology from Lund University, where his research focused on Chinese immigrant experiences in Sweden through extensive ethnographic fieldwork. He studied sociology at Zhejiang University, one of China's top institutions, and has published on Chinese parenting, migration, and identity at international academic conferences.
about.zekaiCredentials: Lund University · Zhejiang University · Published researcher
about.whyTeam: Our founders combine strategy consulting, academic research, and lived cross-cultural experience across five countries. Matt's career spans AI-driven supply chain strategy in Shanghai, UN partnerships in Geneva, and Nordic tech business development. Zekai's published ethnographic research on Chinese communities in Europe gives Mirai an evidence-based understanding of the people and cultures we serve — not just the markets.

chineseOrgs.label: For Chinese organizations
chineseOrgs.headline: Market entry, coordinated end-to-end
chineseOrgs.subhead: From entity setup to your first hire, we manage the entire process of entering Poland, Estonia, and the Nordics — in your language.
chineseOrgs.pain1: Language barrier with local legal, tax, and banking systems
chineseOrgs.pain3: Navigating FDI screening and entity structuring without Chinese-speaking support
chineseOrgs.pain4: Work permits and immigration for your team
chineseOrgs.pain5: Cultural mismatch in negotiations with European counterparts
chineseOrgs.entryCoordDesc: End-to-end project management for your market entry
chineseOrgs.entitySetupDesc: Sp. z o.o., branch office, representative office — we guide the full process
chineseOrgs.bankingDesc: Corporate account opening navigation with our banking contacts
chineseOrgs.immigrationDesc: Work permits, Temporary Residence Cards, EU Blue Card
chineseOrgs.softLandingDesc: Housing, schools, healthcare, daily life support
chineseOrgs.networkDesc: We coordinate vetted specialists so you have one trusted contact for everything.

professionals.label: For Chinese professionals
professionals.headline: Your partner for life and work in Europe
professionals.subhead: Whether you are just arriving or have been here for years, we help you navigate the system and build your life in Poland and Europe.
professionals.service1Desc: TRC renewals, employer changes, student-to-work transition, Blue Card applications
professionals.service2Desc: Credential recognition, networking, job placement, CV and interview support
professionals.service3Desc: PIT filing, double taxation treaty benefits, financial planning guidance
professionals.service4Desc: Healthcare, housing, banking, insurance, driver's license — everything practical
professionals.service5Desc: Networking events, WeChat group, professional associations
professionals.service6Desc: Starting a company in Poland — JDG vs. Sp. z o.o. guidance, registration support
professionals.communityDesc: Join the Mirai professional network — the premier community for Chinese professionals in Poland and Europe. Connect, learn, and grow with peers who understand the corridor.

europeanFirms.label: For European firms
europeanFirms.headline: China access, locally grounded
europeanFirms.subhead: We help Polish, Estonian, and Nordic companies access Chinese markets, partners, and talent through cultural intelligence and trusted coordination.
europeanFirms.service1Desc: Regulatory landscape, entity options, market sizing, risk assessment
europeanFirms.service2Desc: Workshops, negotiation preparation, business culture briefings
europeanFirms.service3Desc: Supplier vetting, distributor matching, due diligence support
europeanFirms.service4Desc: Hosting Chinese delegations, B2B matchmaking, site visits
europeanFirms.service5Desc: Product registration, labeling, e-commerce (Tmall, JD, XHS)
europeanFirms.service6Desc: Bilingual recruitment, Chinese-speaking professionals for your team
europeanFirms.whyMiraiBody: We are not a translation agency or a general consulting firm. We are a specialist coordination team with lived experience on both sides of the corridor — combining strategy consulting, academic research on Chinese communities, and a network of vetted specialists.

insights.headline: Insights
insights.subhead: Analysis and practical guidance for the China–Europe corridor.
insights.otherLangNote: Our insights are currently published in English and Chinese. Use the links below to read.
insights.fullContentComingSoon: Full article content coming soon. Subscribe to our newsletter to be notified when new insights are published.
insights.consultationPrompt: Have a specific question? Book a consultation with our team.
insights.post1Title: 10 things Chinese companies need to know about opening a bank account in Poland
insights.post1Excerpt: Corporate banking in Poland is notoriously difficult for Chinese-owned entities. Here's what you need to prepare — from required documentation to the institutions most likely to say yes.
insights.post2Title: Poland's 2025 immigration reform: what changed for Chinese professionals
insights.post2Excerpt: The new MOS digital platform, updated work permit rules, and what they mean for your residence status. A practical update for Chinese nationals in Poland.
insights.post3Title: The EU Blue Card in Poland: a practical guide
insights.post3Excerpt: Salary thresholds, application process, and the new right to register a business — everything you need to know about Poland's EU Blue Card pathway.
insights.post4Title: Understanding Polish business culture: a guide for Chinese managers
insights.post4Excerpt: Formality, contractual precision, and established procedures — how Polish business norms differ from Chinese relationship-first approaches.
insights.post5Title: EV supply chain in Poland: opportunities for Chinese manufacturers
insights.post5Excerpt: Poland is Europe's largest lithium-ion battery exporter. Here's where Chinese suppliers fit in the value chain.

legal.privacyDataCollectedBody: We collect personal data that you provide directly to us through our contact form, including your name, email address, company name, and message content. We do not collect data through tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
legal.privacyPurposeBody: We process your personal data for the purpose of responding to your inquiry and providing our consulting services. We do not share your data with third parties except vetted partner specialists involved in delivering services you have requested.
legal.privacyRightsBody: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, to restrict or object to its processing, and to data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@miraisolutions.org.
legal.privacyCookiesBody: We use a single cookie to remember your cookie consent preference. We do not use tracking, advertising, or analytics cookies.
legal.impressumDisclaimer: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, tax, or financial advice. MiraiWorks OÜ makes no representations as to the accuracy or completeness of any information on this site.
